name: Zyra

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Garden of Thorns
passive.description_source: Innate:  Zyra's Seeds can be turned into plants by hitting them with her basic abilities. Enemy  champions can step over a Seed to destroy it.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, Zyra spawns one or two Seeds nearby that last for 30 seconds, granting sight over the surrounding area for 1 second.
After 1 second, enemy champions can destroy Seeds by moving on top of them.
Zyra can only have a total of 8 Seeds planted at a time, preserving Seeds spawned by Rampant Growth over Seeds spawned by Garden of Thorns.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, Zyra spawns one or two Seeds nearby that last for 30 seconds, granting sight over the surrounding area for 1 second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Garden of Thorns periodically spawns one or two seeds; template and patch-history review confirm stochastic two-seed occurrences but do not publish a deterministic weighting value.

Manual verification (2026-02-24): Garden of Thorns is a seed lifecycle system (spawn -> short grace period -> stompable seed -> spell conversion). Q/E conversion determines resulting plant behavior, so simulation should model seed state transitions rather than direct passive damage events.

Research note (2026-02-24): Current template data and patch-history documentation were reviewed for one-vs-two seed weighting; no authoritative probability metric is published, so weighting remains unparameterized in canonical data.

basic_ability_1.name: Deadly Spines
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Zyra sprouts a field of thorny vines at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Zyra sprouts thorny spines at the target location that appear after a 0.

effects.description: If Deadly Spine hits a Seed, it sprouts into a Thorn Spitter that lasts for 8 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Zyra sprouts thorny spines at the target location that appear after a 0.625-seconds delay, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Each Thorn Spitter will generate 2 stacks of Conqueror and 1 stack of each of Phase Rush and Electrocute.

basic_ability_2.name: Rampant Growth
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Zyra plants a Seed at the target location that remains for a while. Enemy  champions can step on the seed to destroy it and become briefly  revealed.

effects.description: Active: Zyra plants a Seed at the target location that remains for 60 seconds and grants sight over the surrounding area, though decreasing in radius after 1 second. After 1.5 seconds, enemy champions can destroy the Seed by stepping on it, which reveals them for 2 seconds.
Zyra periodically stocks a Seed charge, up to a maximum of 2. Killing an enemy generates 35% charge toward a Seed, increased to 100% for large enemies and whenever scoring an enemy champion takedown.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Zyra plants a Seed at the target location that remains for 60 seconds and grants sight over the surrounding area, though decreasing in radius after 1 second. After 1.5 seconds, enemy champions can destroy the Seed by stepping on it, which reveals them for 2 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability always employs Quick cast.

basic_ability_3.name: Grasping Roots
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Zyra shoots a surge of vines in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and briefly  roots them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Zyra shoots a surge of vines in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and roots them for a duration.
Active: Zyra shoots a surge of vines in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and roots them for a duration.

effects.description: If Grasping Roots hits a Seed, it sprouts into a Vine Lasher that lasts for 8 seconds.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Zyra shoots a surge of vines in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and roots them for a duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

ultimate.name: Stranglethorns
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Zyra summons a monstrous thicket at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit as it expands.

effects.context_notes: Active: Zyra summons a monstrous thicket at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit as it expands.

effects.description: After 2 seconds, the thicket snaps upward to knock up enemies within for 1 second.

Plants hit by the thicket become enraged, restoring 50% of their current health, increasing their maximum health by 50%, gaining 25% increased size and refreshing their duration while the thicket expands. Additionally they attack in a flurry, launching two shots per attack, dealing [ 150% damage per flurry. ][ 75% damage per shot. ]

ultimate.description: Active: Zyra summons a monstrous thicket at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit as it expands.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Plants grown during the 2 seconds prior to the displacement will also be enraged.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Garden of Thorns seed lifecycle, conversion gating, and player-visible deny semantics
historical validation that Garden of Thorns two-seed spawns are documented as occasional without published deterministic weighting

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
